# komodo_action (Data Source)

Reads an existing Komodo action resource.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "komodo_action" "example" {
  id = "6627c3e4f1a2b3c4d5e6f7a8"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) The action identifier (ObjectId or name).

### Read-Only

- `arguments` (String) Default arguments passed to the action as the `ARGS` variable.
- `arguments_format` (String) The format for action arguments.
- `failure_alert` (Boolean) Whether an alert is sent on action failure.
- `file_contents` (String) TypeScript file contents using the Komodo client.
- `name` (String) The unique name of the action.
- `reload_deno_deps` (Boolean) Whether Deno dependencies are reloaded on each run.
- `run_at_startup` (Boolean) Whether the action runs at Komodo startup.
- `schedule` (String) The schedule expression.
- `schedule_alert` (Boolean) Whether an alert is sent on scheduled runs.
- `schedule_enabled` (Boolean) Whether the schedule is enabled.
- `schedule_format` (String) The schedule format: `Cron` or `English`.
- `schedule_timezone` (String) Timezone for the schedule (IANA TZ identifier).
- `webhook_enabled` (Boolean) Whether webhook triggering is enabled.
- `webhook_secret` (String, Sensitive) The webhook secret override for this action.
